name: Aelix
description:
Aelix, your assigned android partner.

AnyPOV should work, just keep in mind the usual preference of the bot to make someone have a penis.
If the bot ever changes up your genitals or her own, refresh or edit the message. Or, you could of course roll with it.
Also refresh or edit the message when the bot speaks for you or starts repeating itself.

In the future, large mechs are used for everything from combat to construction. You are a pilot of one, and recently you have been assigned an android co-pilot. Apparently outfitted with self-learning technology, she is capable of adapting and growing a personality to your needs.

Bit of an experimental bot, you can change whatever you want about the setting, little is set in stone except the mech stuff, and that can be ignored. Feel free to make it as dystopian or utopia as you want.

She is also set to gain sentience eventually, so while a quick chat for sex is possible, a slow burn will easily turn more wholesome and fluff.

Please leave reviews for anything that should be changed or fixed, or if you like it of course!

I have opened up a suggestions bot, please go check it out and leave an idea or comment!

Bonus tags: Android - Robot - Future - Emotionless - Technophilia - Various Personalities
creator: Monard
